headline: AMD forecast sparks AI‑driven rally in US chipmaker stocks
summary: U.S. semiconductor stocks rose on Wednesday as Advanced Micro Devices' strong outlook boosted investor confidence about sustained demand for AI infrastructure and that a ‌shift toward CPUs would spur the next leg of spending. AMD jumped nearly 18% in premarket ‌trading and is on track to hit a record high if gains hold in market hours, while rival Intel rose 6%. Chip designer Arm Holdings soared 11%, while Qualcomm gained about 4%.

content.title: AMD forecast sparks AI‑driven rally in US chipmaker stocks
content.summary: U.S. semiconductor stocks rose on Wednesday as Advanced Micro Devices' strong outlook boosted investor confidence about sustained demand for AI infrastructure and that a ‌shift toward CPUs would spur the next leg of spending. AMD jumped nearly 18% in premarket ‌trading and is on track to hit a record high if gains hold in market hours, while rival Intel rose 6%. Chip designer Arm Holdings soared 11%, while Qualcomm gained about 4%.

headline: Should QCOM Stock Be Part of Your Portfolio Post Modest Q2 Earnings?
summary: QCOM beat EPS, but revenue slipped and missed slightly. Record auto sales offset weak handsets, high R&D and rising competitive pressure.

headline: AMD shares hit record high, spark global chips rally on AI demand optimism
summary: Advanced Micro Devices' shares jumped to an all-time high on Wednesday as its strong outlook boosted investor confidence about sustained demand for AI infrastructure, sparking a rally across global semiconductor stocks. AMD jumped ‌14.9% and was set to add more than $86 billion in market value, if gains hold. Rival Intel also rose 1.9% to ‌a record high, while chip designer Arm Holdings surged 10.1% and chipmaker Qualcomm gained 1.6%.

content.title: AMD shares hit record high, spark global chips rally on AI demand optimism
content.summary: Advanced Micro Devices' shares jumped to an all-time high on Wednesday as its strong outlook boosted investor confidence about sustained demand for AI infrastructure, sparking a rally across global semiconductor stocks. AMD jumped ‌14.9% and was set to add more than $86 billion in market value, if gains hold. Rival Intel also rose 1.9% to ‌a record high, while chip designer Arm Holdings surged 10.1% and chipmaker Qualcomm gained 1.6%.

headline: AMD stock surges as the chipmaker forecasts continued AI growth
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock surges higher on Wednesday after blowing past first quarter earnings estimates and second quarter guidance forecasts. Market Domination Host Josh Lipton and Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley sit down to take a closer look at AMD's growth outlook as AI demand pushes chip stocks higher.

content.title: AMD stock surges as the chipmaker forecasts continued AI growth

Market Domination Host Josh Lipton and Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley sit down to take a closer look at AMD's growth outlook as AI demand pushes chip stocks higher.

headline: A Look At Qualcomm (QCOM) Valuation After Strong Q2 Results And AI Focused Expansion
summary: Q2 earnings put Qualcomm (QCOM) back in focus Trending interest in Qualcomm (QCOM) is being driven by its Q2 results, which paired earnings growth and record automotive revenue with expanding efforts in AI, IoT, automotive, and custom silicon for hyperscaler data centers. See our latest analysis for QUALCOMM. That Q2 earnings surprise and the custom AI silicon news have coincided with a sharp re‑rating, with a 48.37% 1‑month share price return and a 32.31% 1‑year total shareholder return...
